beats.label: Homepage Overview
beats.caption: Pelian homepage showing services and portfolio
beats.narrationText: Pelian builds end-to-end AI engineering solutions that transform businesses.

beats.label: Click Juno Project
beats.caption: Clicking on the Juno healthcare project
beats.narrationText: Let me show you our Juno project - a maternal health AI agent we built for healthcare.

beats.label: Juno Project Page
beats.caption: Juno project details page loads
beats.narrationText: Here's Juno in action. This AI agent helps healthcare providers with maternal health support, processing medical documents and providing instant insights.

beats.label: Hover Juno Demo
beats.caption: Hovering over Juno interface elements
beats.narrationText: Juno can summarize medical reports, answer questions from thousands of documents, and provide real-time support - all while maintaining strict healthcare compliance.

beats.label: Scroll Results
beats.caption: Scrolling to show results and metrics
beats.narrationText: For our client, Juno reduced document review time from hours to seconds, giving medical teams instant access to critical information.

beats.label: Summary
beats.caption: Back to portfolio overview
beats.narrationText: That's Juno - just one example of how Pelian builds AI agents that deliver real business impact. Ready to transform your operations with AI?
